title: Data Gaps Visibility Dashboard
description: Create a data quality page showing which countries and materials are MISSING indicator data (EPI, WGI scores). Purpose: Identify suppliers to contact for sustainability data improvement.
acceptanceCriteria: Show countries in procurement data that have NO EPI scores
Show countries in procurement data that have NO WGI scores
Display coverage percentages (e.g., '7 of 10 supplier countries have EPI data')
Actionable insight: Which suppliers/countries need follow-up
Power BI page with clear data gap visualizations
notes: REVISED SCOPE: Changed from match rate visibility to DATA GAPS visibility
Purpose is actionable: 'Contact these suppliers for sustainability data'
Shows what's MISSING, not what's matched
Portfolio showcase: demonstrates data quality awareness
